scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && python -m uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && python -m uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:revision: cd apps/api && python -m uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.test:api: cd apps/api && python -m uv run pytest
